news.summary: Cryptocurrency analyst Benjamin Cowen has raised concerns about Bitcoin's recent downturn in a podcast on June 4th. Cowen pointed out that Bitcoin has fallen by approximately 7-8% from its peak and may continue to decline in the third quarter. He predicted a pullback of 10-15% after a golden cross, a technical indicator. Cowen highlighted the "supply in profit" metric, which currently stands at 96.71%, indicating potential trouble as historical data suggest market tops when this figure surpasses 97-99%. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin's correction deepening in Q3, may exceed 10-15% as supply in profit metric hits 96.71%, near threshold for market tops.

news.summary: Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) volatility is a well-known aspect of the digital asset, however, Bitwise Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan suggests that its inclusion in a diversified portfolio could enhance performance without significantly raising risks. In a recent publication by Bitwise Asset Management on June 3, Hougan challenges the conventional approach of assessing Bitcoin in isolation. He advises considering the addition of Bitcoin within the context of the entire risk budget of the portfolio. By analyzing various hypothetical portfolio allocations spanning from 2017 to 2024, including traditional 60/40 stock-bond splits with Bitcoin incorporations, Hougan found that a 5% allocation to Bitcoin notably boosted returns from 107% to 207%. Despite this increase, the overall portfolio volatility, as measured by standard deviation, also heightened. For more information, the detailed article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitwise's Matt Hougan suggests Bitcoin can enhance portfolio returns with lower risk. For example, a 5% Bitcoin allocation boosted returns from 107% to 207%. Examine full story on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Illinois-based bank, INB, has recently opened a new full-service banking branch in Tampa, Florida, on June 4, 2025. The branch aims to provide a wide range of services to customers in the area.
news.headline: INB opens new branch in Tampa, Florida, a significant milestone in strategic growth in Florida. Expansion began 2 years ago.

news.summary: A recently released real-time private company dataset provides crucial pricing and valuation insights for private companies, investors, and advisors. This dataset includes up-to-date information that can be invaluable for decision-making processes. With this dataset, private companies have access to essential data that can aid in understanding market trends and industry benchmarks. Investors can leverage this information to make informed investment choices, while advisors can use it to provide strategic guidance. The dataset offers detailed data and analysis for a wide range of private companies, giving stakeholders a comprehensive view of the market landscape. This resource is particularly beneficial for those seeking accurate and relevant information to support their financial decisions.
news.headline: Nasdaq provides exclusive access to Nasdaq Private Market’s Tape D API, offering real-time private company data for valuation insights.

news.summary: A groundbreaking app called Running Mate, created to enhance safety for women while running, has introduced the Running Mate Collective on June 4, 2025. This new initiative aims to empower women through safety education and expert guidance. The Running Mate Collective is a community-driven effort that seeks to make running a safer and more inclusive activity for women.

news.summary: In a recent development, Derivita has integrated its comprehensive math support, assessment, and analytics platform with the TI-Nspire™ CX II graphing calculator. news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, on June 4, 2025, it was reported that the worldwide Coagulation Analyzer Market, which was worth US$3,516.0 million in 2024, has now grown to US$3,770.9 million in 2025. It is predicted to continue on a strong growth trajectory with a steady compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.2% from 2025 to 2030. By the end of this period, it is expected to reach a projected value of US$5,335.9 million.
news.headline: Global Coagulation Analyzer Market to reach US$5,335.9 million by 2030, growing at 7.2% CAGR from 2025.

news.summary: A leading ADR provider, JAMS, headquartered in Irvine, California, has recently announced the expansion of its services with the launch of a new Labor Arbitration Practice. This move reinforces JAMS' position as a key player in the alternative dispute resolution sector. Along with this new practice area, JAMS has also introduced specialized Labor Rules to streamline the resolution process for labor-related disputes. These additions demonstrate JAMS' commitment to providing efficient and effective arbitration services in the labor sector, contributing to its strong reputation in the industry.
news.headline: JAMS in Irvine, California, expands leadership with new Labor Arbitration Practice and Rules.
